creditCards.name: Discover it Cash Back
creditCards.signupBonus: Unlimited Cashback Match - Discover matches all cash back earned in first year

rewardsRate.rotating: 5% cash back on rotating categories (up to $1,500/quarter, activation required)
rewardsRate.all: 1% cash back on all other purchases

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 months
Freeze it feature for card security

creditCards.name: Discover it Miles
creditCards.signupBonus: Miles Match - Discover matches all miles earned at end of first year

rewardsRate.all: 1.5x miles on every purchase (effectively 3x in first year with Miles Match)

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases for 15 months
Redeem miles for travel statement credits
Freeze it feature for card security
